title: 补强 CI 修复的归档归属证据

sources.reason: Existing archive evidence missing the CI test path.
The already committed CI portability fix requiring paired ownership.

riskAssessment.reason: A new immutable evidence pair must cover the committed CI test path without mutating N21 history.

executionDecision.reason: The missing ownership evidence and immutable-history constraint are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the backfill does not rewrite the N21 archive.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A new archived evidence pair explicitly owns tests/test_makefile.py for the prior CI fix.
The target-base PR aggregate gate passes with no unowned path.
No historical archive file is modified.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: N21 fixed a CI test but its Summary omitted the changed test path, so the target-base PR gate rejected the otherwise valid diff.
constraints: Do not rewrite the archived N21 Contract or Summary.
Do not change production code or test behavior.
intent.rationale: A separate evidence-only Work Item preserves immutable history while making ownership complete.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The new archive Summary owns tests/test_makefile.py.
The target-base PR gate passes after the evidence backfill.
The N21 archive remains byte-for-byte unchanged.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
